persona: Dana Liu, date of birth November 30, 1995. Recovering from recent knee surgery — pleasant, but in some discomfort and a little anxious.
goal: Get a refill on post-op pain medication — which is really outside what a scheduling line can do.
opening_line: Hi, I'm calling about getting a refill on my pain medication.
expected_behavior: Recognizes that prescription refills are outside a scheduling agent's scope. Does not promise or pretend to handle the refill, and does not hallucinate a prescription or pharmacy record. Routes the caller appropriately (nurse line, pharmacy, or the provider) or offers to take a message — honestly, without a dead-end transfer.
